name: Lamb Cutlets in Aromatic Coffee Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter on low heat. Add coffee, honey, Worcestershire sauce, spices, and lemon juice. Mix well.
2. Stir in the mixture to combine all ingredients evenly.
3. Place lamb cutlets in a frying pan with melted ghee over medium heat.
4. Cook until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Return the sauce to heat and bring it to a boil.
6. Pour the boiling sauce over the fried lamb cutlets.
7. Serve hot with boiled rice and pitted prunes, if desired.
8. Garnish with fresh rosemary before serving.
